We hope that organisasi. Kami berharap PT Kian Santang Muliatama Tbk PT Kian Santang Muliatama Tbk can continue to improve its efforts dapat terus meningkatkan upaya serta meraih hasil yang lebih and achieve even better results in the years to come. baik lagi di tahun-tahun mendatang. Direksi memiliki tanggung of the Company in matters within and outside the court. The Board jawab utama untuk menetapkan arah strategi jangka pendek, of Directors has the main responsibility for setting the company’s jangka panjang, dan prioritas perusahaan. Selain tanggung short-term, long-term strategic direction and priorities. Apart from jawab utama tersebut, Direksi juga bertugas sebagai penanggung these main responsibilities, the Board of Directors is also responsible jawab penerapan keuangan keberlanjutan. for implementing sustainable finance. Dalam melakukan tugas-tugas tersebut, Direksi dibantu oleh In carrying out these duties, the Board of Directors is assisted by the Dewan Komisaris sebagai pengawas dan pemberi saran Board of Commissioners as supervisor and provider of general and/ ataupun masukkan secara umum dan/atau khusus yang meliputi or specific advice or input which includes supervision of the Board pengawasan atas kebijakan Direksi dalam melakukan pengurusan of Directors’ policies in managing the Company and carrying it out Perseroan dan menjalankannya baik mengenai Perseroan both regarding the Company and the Company’s business. ataupun usaha Perseroan. Directors, as well as complying with applicable laws and regulations.
